name: Tales of Terror
short_description: Tales of Terror invites you to delve into a chilling co-op horror survival experience. Unite to face unique enemies, navigate through visually stunning and treacherous levels and navigate the unknown. —Your ultimate challenge awaits: escape, if you can!
detailed_description:
TOTAL TRANSFORMATION UPDATE!

🎮 Total Transformation Update: Every facet of Tales of Terror has been meticulously revamped. Immerse yourself in spine-tingling visuals, revamped gameplay mechanics, and an atmosphere that will chill you to the bone.


About the Game

Immerse yourself in 'Tales of Terror'—keep it in your Wishlist and follow along as frequent updates transform this game into a uniquely special, terrifying, and thrilling experience.

Embark on an unforgettable journey into the unknown with 'Tales of Terror'! Brace yourself for a gripping PVE experience that not only pushes the boundaries of fear but invites you to share the thrills with friends in an immersive co-op adventure.

Key Features:

👥 Cooperative Horror: Team up with friends in heart-pounding 4-player cooperative gameplay. Face the terror together, or go solo if you dare.

🧟‍♂️ Monstrous Outbreak: Explore a desolate science research facility overrun by a nightmarish outbreak. Confront mutated horrors, solve mysteries, and survive the relentless onslaught.

🕵️ Solo Survival: For the brave souls who prefer to go it alone, solo play offers a unique and intense survival experience. Can you navigate the twisted corridors and unravel the dark secrets?

🌐 Uncover the Unknown: Dive into a narrative-rich horror adventure that challenges your wits and survival instincts. Uncover the secrets hidden within the corrupted facility and face the horrors that lurk in the shadows.

Are you ready to confront the nightmares that await? Gather your courage, assemble your team, or brave the darkness alone. Tales of Terror awaits, and the horror has evolved. Will you survive the SRF Labs?

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Italian, Czech, Dutch, Finnish, Hungarian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Turkish, Romanian
*languages with full audio support
